message:
feat(harness): complete idempotent dedup handling for distributed spawn simulation

Wire idempotency key through RunningTask and complete dedup records on
task completion (success, cancel, lease-expired) so that duplicate
SpawnRequests after completion can resend cached SpawnAck and
ResultDelivery. On duplicate detection, the remote node now sends the
original SpawnAck:Accepted and, if a terminal outcome is cached, also
replays the ResultDelivery — matching the protocol spec for safe retry
semantics.

Adds two tests:
- duplicate_spawn_resends_ack: verifies a second SpawnRequest during
  execution produces a re-sent SpawnAck without creating a second task
- duplicate_spawn_after_completion_resends_result: verifies a duplicate
  SpawnRequest after task completion replays both ack and result

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
